text: Customer cannot log in after password reset and says payroll is blocked.
I was charged twice for the same subscription this month.
Unable to select desired product from menu.

Exporting customer reports to CSV throws an internal server error every time we try it.
Please add support for scheduled report delivery to email. We need this for our weekly operations review.
Our admin left the company and we need ownership of the account transferred to a new primary contact.
The API returns 'invalid token' for all requests even though the token was generated today and has the right scopes.
We cancelled last week but just received another invoice. Please confirm whether the account is still active.
Single sign-on login is failing for all employees and nobody can access the platform right now.
When we try to sync records from Salesforce, only half the contacts are imported and there are no clear error messages.
The new UI is confusing and several team members cannot find where to update account settings anymore.
Refund requested for the annual plan because we were billed after downgrading to monthly.
The mobile app crashes immediately after tapping the notifications tab on iOS 18.
We need a way to restrict dashboard access by department so managers only see their own team's data.
